displayNameZh: 产品稳定度可以透过提升技术力增加
summary: Yt Tech Boosts Stability component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「产品稳定度可以透过提升技术力增加」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-tech-boosts-stability/src/YtTechBoostsStability.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtTechBoostsStability` and `ytTechBoostsStabilityDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Tech Boosts Stability Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-tech-boosts-stability to my project. Preserve the exported YtTechBoostsStabilityProps API and register the YtTechBoostsStability composition with the default props.
